Get computer training:

November 1995
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

The Medill School of Journalism and NICAR are offering computer-assisted reporting training programs for journalists in December and January-March at their respective locations.

Get computer training:

The Medill School of Journalism, four-day computer-assisted reporting bootcamp, Dec. 7-10. Medill's Washington, D.C., campus. NICAR Bootcamps, week-long intensive training seminars, jan. 7-12, and March 10-15, Columbia, Mo. These dates are open to all journalists. For more information, call NICAR, (314) 882-0684, or send e-mail to nicar@muccmail.missouri.edu.
